headline: Paychex (PAYX) Stock After 27% Slide Weighing DCF Upside Against Mixed Narratives
summary: With Paychex stock sitting at US$96.38, many investors are asking the same question: is the current price a fair reflection of what the business is worth, or has the market mispriced it? Over the past year, the stock has fallen 27.3%, with year-to-date returns down 11.3%. The shorter term moves show a decline of 1.2% over the last week and 0.6% over the last month, which can change how the market views both risk and potential. Recent coverage of Paychex has focused on how the company is...
